message:
fix(tui): severity-aware ring buffer eviction, test fixes, and dashboard lint cleanup

Event ring buffer improvements:
- Implement severity-aware eviction: when capacity is reached, evict the
  lowest-severity event first instead of always evicting the oldest, so
  high-priority events (MessageSent, MessageReceived) survive longer than
  low-priority ones (ToolCallStart)
- Refactor recipient formatting to use match on Ordering instead of
  chained if-else for cleaner control flow
- Add tests: ring_buffer_prefers_evicting_low_severity_first and
  ring_buffer_evicts_oldest_when_only_high_severity_events_exist

Test fixes:
- console.rs: fix LogViewer filter test to use literal substring ("WARN")
  instead of regex pattern, matching set_filter's actual API
- tui_markdown.rs: replace Brainfuck-like test content in unknown-language
  fence test with unambiguous "foo = bar(42)" to avoid false negatives

Dashboard cleanup:
- Hoist ToolAgg struct definition out of render_tool_latency_panel to
  module scope (fixes clippy items_after_statements)
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] on render_insight_rail
- Use sort_by_key with Reverse instead of sort_by with manual cmp

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
